description: Forced behaviors, personality changes, and social effects. What the item compels you to do against your better judgment.
limitations: Tongue Bound
The wielder's native language vanishes from their lips. Familiar words become foreign, and only other tongues remain.
Duel Sworn
Every formal challenge must be accepted. The item will not allow its bearer to refuse a fight offered with honor.
Magpie Urge
Shiny things become irresistible. Coins, gems, buttons, anything that catches light fills the wielder with desperate need.
Spendthrift
The wielder overpays for everything and cannot stop themselves. Merchants love them. Companions do not.
Truth Spill
Ask a direct question after use and the truth pours out, unfiltered and unstoppable, for an uncomfortable stretch.
Poet's Curse
Every word must rhyme while the bond holds. Casual conversation becomes performance, and stumbling over verse draws the item's displeasure.
Humor Ban
Jokes die on the tongue. Puns twist into silence. The item has no patience for levity and enforces its preference.
Hooked
The first taste is free. After that, going without it feels wrong, then painful, then unbearable.
Fixation
The item occupies more and more of the wielder's thoughts. Other priorities shrink. Only the item matters.
Daily Demand
Miss a day and it punishes. The item insists on being used, and it has ways of making its displeasure known.
Battle Hungry
It demands to be drawn in every fight. Leaving it sheathed during combat feels like holding your breath underwater.
Withdrawal
Use it often or suffer. The shaking starts first, then the headaches, then the desperate need that drowns out reason.
Honest Burden
Lies become impossible. The wielder speaks only truth, whether they want to or not, no matter the cost.
Craven Heart
Courage drains away slowly. Danger that once seemed manageable now feels overwhelming. The urge to flee grows louder.
Silver Tongue
The item whispers that lies are easier, kinder, smarter. The wielder finds deception rolling off their tongue before they realize.
Reckless Abandon
Restraint dissolves. The wielder pushes harder, goes further, and risks more than they should, drunk on the item's power.
